channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kaitlan Collins Defends CNN Coverage of Fallen U.S. Troops After White House Clash
item.description: CNN correspondent Kaitlan Collins responded to a tense exchange with White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt over coverage of the U.S. military's casualties in Iran. The conflict arose after Defe...

item.title: U.S. House votes to support President Trump’s military action in Iran despite war powers resolution
item.description: On 5th March 2026, the U.S. House of Representatives voted against a bipartisan resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump’s military campaign against Iran. The resolution sought to require C...

item.title: Review of ZEE5 Marathi Horror Series ‘Andhar Maya’ Set in Konkan
item.description: ‘Andhar Maya’ is ZEE5’s first Marathi horror series, set in the scenic Konkan region of Western India. The show follows an extended family visiting their ancestral home to observe death rites of a rec...

item.title: Finn Allen Highlights New Zealand's Boosted Confidence After Semi-Final Win Over South Africa
item.description: New Zealand's opener Finn Allen described their massive semi-final victory over South Africa as a major confidence booster ahead of the T20 World Cup final on Sunday in Ahmedabad. Allen smashed the fa...

item.title: Middle East conflict intensifies with Iran targeting Kurdish groups and regional strikes
item.description: The Middle East is witnessing a rapid escalation of conflict after US-Israeli attacks on Iran killed the country’s supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. In retaliation, Iran launched strikes on Kurd...

item.title: Mamata alleges Matua community faces exclusion from voter lists during SIR process
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has raised concerns regarding the Matua community, alleging that they are being deliberately excluded from the voter lists through the Special Intensive Revi...

item.title: NUJ Calls for Immediate Measures to Tackle Rising Insecurity in Ondo State
item.description: The Nigeria Union of Journalists (NUJ), Ondo State chapter, don express serious concern as security wahala dey increase for the state, especially kidnappings. During their monthly congress for Alagbak...

item.title: The Role of Male Teachers in Promoting Gender Equality in Schools
item.description: International Women’s Day is a reminder for everyone, regardless of gender, to reflect on and act against gender inequality. Schools are pivotal environments for promoting gender equity, as teachers i...

item.title: PM Modi and Macron Emphasise Dialogue Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: New Delhi: India is actively engaging with the international community regarding the current situation in the West Asia region. On Thursday, Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke with French President Em...

item.title: B19 Focused on Strong Performance Ahead of Federation Cup Match with Simba
item.description: B19 Football Club from Kigamboni dey ramp up preparations as dem dey ready for the tough Round of 32 match for the Federation Cup against Simba SC, one of Tanzania's top football teams. The match go h...

item.title: Comedian James Barr Turns His Experience of Domestic Abuse into Stand-Up
item.description: James Barr, a 41-year-old British comedian and breakfast radio host, revealed that a Botox treatment unexpectedly triggered suppressed memories of domestic abuse by his former boyfriend, Alex. The int...

item.title: Canada considers defensive support for Gulf allies amid Iran conflict
item.description: Canada’s Chief of the Defence Staff, General Jennie Carignan, has indicated that the Canadian military is reviewing potential options to support Gulf states amid ongoing tensions with Iran. Speaking a...

item.title: Ensuring Black South Africans’ pensions are safeguarded
item.description: Deputy Finance Minister David Masondo addresses accusations that the Public Investment Corporation (PIC) is 'anti-black' when protecting the pensions of black South Africans. The PIC manages over R3 t...

item.title: IAF Su-30MKI Fighter Jet Crashes During Training in Assam
item.description: The Indian Air Force (IAF) has reported that a Su-30MKI fighter jet crashed while on a routine training mission in Karbi Anglong, Assam, about 60 kilometres from Jorhat. The aircraft had taken off on ...

item.title: Canada’s Support for the U.S.-Israel Conflict with Iran and the Selective Enforcement of International Law
item.description: In March 2026, Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney delivered a speech at the World Economic Forum in Davos, advocating for middle powers to act together to protect international law and the multilater...

item.title: Deputy President Kindiki Urges Unity and Forgives Regional Critics
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has publicly stated that he holds no grudges against fellow leaders from Mt. Kenya despite the criticism he has faced. Speaking in Meru County during an inspection of ...

item.title: South Korean fugitive using fake Filipino identity arrested in Batangas
item.description: Authorities in the Philippines arrested Kim Yong Cheol, a 62-year-old South Korean fugitive, in Batangas after he had been living in the country under a stolen Filipino identity. Kim was apprehended a...

item.title: Karl Stefanovic to record podcast with Pauline Hanson and Barnaby Joyce after One Nation fundraiser
item.description: Karl Stefanovic, currently hosting the Today show, is expanding into YouTube as an “anti-woke” podcaster. Recently, One Nation promoted a live podcast with Stefanovic, Pauline Hanson, and Barnaby Joyc...

item.title: How AI Tools Help Writers And Editors Improve Their Work
item.description: Nowadays, writers dey under serious pressure to deliver content quickly and correctly. Whether na blog, news article, academic paper, or business write-up, everybody wan make sure say e clear, correct...

item.title: Trump asserts that Iran is seeking a deal to end the ongoing conflict as US and Israeli strikes continue
item.description: President Donald Trump has claimed that Iranian representatives have been contacting the United States to negotiate a deal aimed at ending the current war, which has now entered its sixth day. Speakin...
